sql_array: CREATE TABLE train_data (feature1 Float64, feature2 Float64, label Int8);
CREATE TABLE your_model AS SELECT stochasticLogisticRegression(0.1, 0.1, 5, 'SGD') AS state FROM train_data;
SELECT evalMLMethod((SELECT state FROM your_model), feature1, feature2) AS probability FROM train_data;
SELECT probability > 0.7 AS predicted_label FROM (SELECT evalMLMethod((SELECT state FROM your_model), feature1, feature2) AS probability FROM train_data);
